reasoning: First, I will increase R1 to observe if the total resistance changes in a predictable manner.
I increased R1 and observed that the total resistance increased. Now, I will decrease R1 to see if the total resistance decreases accordingly.
The total resistance did not change after decreasing R1, indicating that R2 might not affect the total resistance. I will now increase R2 to observe its effect.

The total resistance remains at 20.0 when both R1 and R2 are set to 10.0, suggesting they are in parallel. Increasing R2 further does not change the total resistance, indicating that the total resistance is solely determined by the individual resistances in this configuration.
